stemHtml: A pilot completed a type rating but hasn't flown for 60 days. Can they carry passengers?

options.a: Yes — 3 take-offs/landings in the preceding 120 days.
options.b: No — an extra flight is needed first.
options.c: No — one landing in the preceding 30 days is needed.
options.d: Yes — 3 take-offs/landings in the preceding 90 days.
